# Load the provided JSON files and search for the given span (normalized: remove diacritics etc.)
import json, re, unicodedata, itertools, textwrap

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    # Remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s) if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # Normalize hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # Remove tatweel and punctuation
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", s)
    # Collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

target_full = "وَإِنَّكَ لَتُحْسِبُهُمْ شَدِيدًا وَهُمْ مُحْسِنُونَ"
target_norm = normalize_arabic(target_full)

def search_quran(snippet_norm):
    hits = []
    for rec in quran:
        ayah = rec.get("ayah_text","")
        ayah_norm = normalize_arabic(ayah)
        if snippet_norm in ayah_norm:
            hits.append(rec)
    return hits

def search_quran_approx(snippet_norm, min_overlap_tokens=3):
    tokens = snippet_norm.split()
    hits = []
    for rec in quran:
        ayah_norm = normalize_arabic(rec.get("ayah_text",""))
        overlap = set(tokens) & set(ayah_norm.split())
        if len(overlap) >= min_overlap_tokens:
            # simple score = overlap size
            hits.append((len(overlap), rec))
    hits.sort(key=lambda x: -x[0])
    return hits[:20]

hits_exact = search_quran(target_norm)
hits_approx = search_quran_approx(target_norm, min_overlap_tokens=2)

len(hits_exact), len(hits_approx), hits_approx[:5]

# Search for occurrences of "محسنون" in Quran to see potential intended ayah
matches = []
for rec in quran:
    text = rec.get("ayah_text","")
    if "مُحْسِنُونَ" in text or "محسنون" in text:
        matches.append(text)
len(matches), matches[:20]

# Search for Surah Ar-Ra'd 13:29 content in the DB by known phrase "طوبى لهم وحسن مآب"
cands = []
for rec in quran:
    text = rec.get("ayah_text","")
    if "طُوبَىٰ لَهُمْ وَحُسْنُ مَـَٔابٍ" in text or "طُوبَى لَهُمْ وَحُسْنُ مَآبٍ" in text or "طوبى لهم" in text:
        cands.append(text)
cands
